creator: ache@FreeBSD.org
text:
A(In reply to Eitan Adler from comment #3)
> Preferences -> Account Information -> changing your name to "Andrey A.
> Chernov" works while I impersonate you.
> 
> The password field should not be filled out.

As I already write in initial description, I already try with not filled password. As I already write in initial description, in that case change stays until re-login, when it reverted back to old version.
